mapper.select: {call sp_book_ticket( #{userId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scheduleId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{passengerName, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passengerIdNumber, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{carriageId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{seatId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fromStationId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{toStationId, mode=IN, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ticketPrice, mode=IN, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seatType, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleDate, mode=IN, jdbcType=DATE}, #{resultCode, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{resultMsg, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId, mode=OUT, jdbcType=BIGINT} )}
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, ticket_status AS ticketStatus, ticket_price AS ticketPrice, schedule_date AS scheduleDate, train_schedule_id AS trainScheduleId FROM ticket_order WHERE id = #{orderId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_order_detail WHERE user_id = #{userId}
